failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch could not return the needed count because the catalog service timed out.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan matched the user request: count available Mechanical Keyboard options using ProductCatalogSearch. The tool invocation at index 3 was well-formed and used the expected arguments. The failure was an explicit infrastructure/connectivity issue: the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms with CatalogServiceTimeoutError. There is no later evidence that the timeout was retried or resolved; subsequent steps only synthesize and validate failure.
